case_title: LEANHART, BRENDA VS PRIORITY PARKING, CA, LLC

docket_entries.description: PER COMM. LYONS, PLTF MOTION FOR RECONSIDERATION IS DENIED. COPIES MAILED TO BOTH PARTIES.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LEANHART, BRENDA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT PRIORITY PARKING, CA, LLC PLAINTIFF IS NOT THE REGISTERED OWNER OF THE SUBJECT VEHICLE AND IS THEREFORE DISQUALIFIED FOR RECOVERING FOR ITS DAMAGE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT PRIORITY PARKING, CA, LLC
PLAINTIFF'S LARGE EXHIBIT IN SEPARATE DRAWER.
PLTF MOTION FOR RECONSIDERATION FILED. $15.40 FEE PAID. COPIES MAILED TO BOTH PARTIES. WAIT 30 DAYS FOR COMM'S DECISION.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,259.63 FILED BY LEANHART, BRENDA AS TO DEFENDANT PRIORITY PARKING, CA, LLC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-10-2003 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
